catalog_row.ModelType: linear backward-looking small U.S. macroeconometric policy model
catalog_row.Category: monetary policy rules; inflation targeting; reduced-form macro model
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Phillips curve; IS/output-gap equation; four-quarter inflation and interest-rate averages; optimized smoothing instrument rule; two iid shocks

status_row.notes: First-pass OCR-backed derivation; no appendix normalization; implementation cross-check used only for selected rule and variable coverage; Dynare not run.

validation.command: check English derivation has all eight required sections
check English and Chinese F-number counts match
validation.details: 19 total F-number references in each file; 7 unique equation numbers, F1-F7

unresolved_issues: OCR mojibake affects prose and some inflation notation.
The shock covariance allowed in the paper's general setup is absent from the MMB implementation.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
